race.comment: DUBAI GOLD (3) has not appeared since he finished tenth over 1400m at this track on March 2. Sure to make his presence felt. NORTHERN BOOGIE (5) is close to breaking through after three consecutive placings, the latest coming when second over 1050m at Inverell. Backmarker who gets home hard. Will enjoy a drop in class and expected to go close. OCTAVIAN TREASURE (1) was out of the money when resuming from a spell last start over 900m at Newcastle, beaten 4.5 lengths. Has a fair record when second up, including two top-three finishes. Ideally placed and is sure to take a ton of beating. MAKTABI (4) is back from a break of five-and-a-half months. Closed last campaign with a narrow defeat over 1100m at Quirindi. Sure to make his presence felt.
